steps.title: Spot the general-to-specific move
steps.content: The first sentence makes a broad claim—de Larios's art reflects a mix of cultural influences. The second sentence then specifies exactly what that mixture is: Mexican and Japanese traditions.

steps.title: Choose the transition that signals clarification
steps.content: Specifically marks the shift from general statement to specific detail. The other choices don't establish this clarification relationship. That matches choice C — C is correct.
